sentences.target: Zum Glück ist kein Unglück passiert.

translations.de: Zum Glück ist kein Unglück passiert.
translations.es: Por suerte, no hubo ningún accidente.
translations.fr: Heureusement, il n’y a pas eu d’accident.
translations.it: Per fortuna, non c'è stato nessun incidente.
translations.pt: Por sorte, não houve nenhum acidente.
translations.vi: May mà không có tai nạn nào xảy ra.
translations.ar: لحسن الحظ لم يحدث أي حادث.
translations.nl: Gelukkig is er geen ongeluk gebeurd.
translations.hi: खुशकिस्मती से कोई हादसा नहीं हुआ.
translations.pl: Na szczęście nic się nie stało.
translations.sv: Som tur var hände ingen olycka.
translations.ro: Din fericire, nu s-a întâmplat niciun accident.
translations.ja: 幸い、事故は起きませんでした。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'zu dem'; preposition governing the dative, forming the PP 'zum Glück' that functions as a sentential adverbial ('fortunately').
Noun in dative singular as the complement of 'zum'; in the fixed expression 'zum Glück' meaning 'fortunately'.
Auxiliary 'sein' forming the present perfect with the past participle 'passiert'.
Negative determiner in nominative neuter singular modifying 'Unglück'; the NP serves as the subject.
Neuter noun; here the grammatical subject of the clause.
Past participle; main lexical verb in the perfect construction; intransitive, selecting 'sein' as auxiliary.

sentences.target: Es gab ein Unglück an der Kreuzung.
sentences.reading: /ɛs ɡaːp aɪ̯n ˈʊnɡlʏk an deːɐ̯ ˈkʁɔʏ̯tsʊŋ/

translations.de: Es gab ein Unglück an der Kreuzung.
translations.ipa: /ɛs ɡaːp aɪ̯n ˈʊnɡlʏk an deːɐ̯ ˈkʁɔʏ̯tsʊŋ/
translations.en: There was an accident at the intersection.
translations.es: Hubo un accidente en el cruce.
translations.fr: Il y a eu un accident au carrefour.
translations.vi: Có tai nạn ở ngã tư.
translations.nl: Er was een ongeluk op de kruising.
translations.nb: Det skjedde en ulykke i krysset.
translations.sv: Det var en olycka i korsningen.
translations.ro: A avut loc un accident la intersecție.
translations.da: Der skete en ulykke i krydset.
translations.ja: 交差点で事故が起きました。

tokens.explanation: Expletive pronoun in the existential construction 'es gab'; non-referential subject placeholder.
Simple past (Präteritum) of 'geben' used idiomatically in 'es gab' meaning 'there was/there were'.
Indefinite article in accusative singular determining 'Unglück' (direct object).
Neuter noun; direct object of 'gab' in the existential construction.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article in dative feminine singular agreeing with 'Kreuzung'.
Feminine noun; object of the preposition 'an' within the locative PP.

sentences.target: Wir sprechen über das Unglück am See.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃpʁɛçən ˈyːbɐ das ˈʊnɡlʏk am zeː/

translations.de: Wir sprechen über das Unglück am See.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃpʁɛçən ˈyːbɐ das ˈʊnɡlʏk am zeː/
translations.en: We are talking about the accident at the lake.
translations.es: Estamos hablando del accidente en el lago.
translations.fr: Nous parlons de l’accident au lac.
translations.ko: 우리는 호수에서 있었던 사고에 대해 이야기하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在谈论湖边发生的事故。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度講緊湖邊發生嘅意外。
translations.ru: Мы говорим о несчастном случае на озере.
translations.pt: Estamos falando sobre o acidente no lago.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nói về vụ tai nạn ở hồ.
translations.ar: نحن نتحدث عن الحادث عند البحيرة.
translations.nl: We praten over het ongeluk bij het meer.
translations.uk: Ми говоримо про нещасний випадок на озері.
translations.hi: हम झील के पास हुए हादसे के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μιλάμε για το ατύχημα στη λίμνη.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om ulykken ved innsjøen.
translations.id: Kami sedang membicarakan kecelakaan di danau.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om olyckan vid sjön.
translations.ro: Vorbim despre accidentul de la lac.
translations.da: Vi taler om ulykken ved søen.
translations.ja: 私たちは湖で起きた事故について話しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite present verb; head of the predicate, selecting a PP complement with 'über' + accusative.
Preposition governing the accusative; marks the topic of discussion.
Definite article in accusative neuter singular determining 'Unglück' as the object of 'über'.
Neuter noun; complement of the preposition 'über' (object of the PP).
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative PP modifying 'Unglück'.
Masculine noun in dative singular; object of the preposition 'am'.

sentences.target: Man kann ein Unglück oft vermeiden.

translations.de: Man kann ein Unglück oft vermeiden.
translations.en: You can often avoid an accident.
translations.es: Muchas veces se puede evitar un accidente.
translations.fr: On peut souvent éviter un accident.
translations.it: Spesso si può evitare un incidente.
translations.zh-Hans: 很多时候可以避免事故。
translations.pt: Muitas vezes é possível evitar um acidente.
translations.vi: Nhiều khi có thể tránh được tai nạn.
translations.nl: Een ongeluk kun je vaak voorkomen.
translations.hu: Gyakran el lehet kerülni egy balesetet.
translations.hi: अक्सर किसी हादसे से बचा जा सकता है.
translations.el: Συχνά μπορείς να αποφύγεις ένα ατύχημα.
translations.nb: Man kan ofte unngå en ulykke.
translations.sv: Man kan ofta undvika en olycka.
translations.ro: De multe ori poți evita un accident.
translations.da: Man kan ofte undgå en ulykke.
translations.ja: 多くの場合、事故は避けられます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal pronoun functioning as a generic subject (3rd person singular).
Modal auxiliary in finite present; selects the bare infinitive 'vermeiden'.
Indefinite article in accusative singular determining 'Unglück' (direct object).
Neuter noun; direct object of the infinitive verb 'vermeiden'.
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb phrase.
Bare infinitive; main lexical verb selected by the modal 'kann'.
